data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Docker, Kubernetes, and Amazon Web Services (AWS) utilized for deployment.

data.title: Chaos Engineering
data.description: The architecture includes chaos engineering practices to ensure robustness.
data.technical_spec: Simian Army tools used to randomly terminate instances to ensure fault tolerance.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Netflix uses a global CDN infrastructure to deliver content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Netflix Open Connect, custom CDNs placed at ISPs around the world.

data.title: Adaptive Streaming
data.description: Ensures smooth video playback by adjusting bitrate based on network conditions.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Processes billions of session starts a day, supporting complex data analytics.
data.technical_spec: Kafka, Flink, and other big data tools.
